Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Summons And Complaint Within Two Years Of Filing ; Points And Authorities And Declarations Of Freya Horne , Brian J. Mccaffrey And Kevin Gerard Karrick In Support
Off Calendar Nov-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jesse C. Ralph, 776-1826, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT KEVIN KARRICK'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Summons And Complaint Within Two Years Of Filing is denied. Plaintiff had obtained extension of time to serve from Court on basis of pending criminal case and defendant has not shown prejudice resulting from delay in service. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Katherine Cuellar, CSR #3164
